title: Webglass Afterimage
text: Your reflection lags half a heartbeat behind and sometimes chooses first.
flavor: Mirrors remember your hands in the wrong order.
trigger: Your first guile check each session.
penalty: Resolve a Heat pulse before applying the check result.
relief: A scout follower may exhaust to name the real path and cancel this trigger.
upside: On success, gain a note about a hidden route or false witness.
